total.description: Total number of matched documents before pagination.

maxScore.description: Maximum relevance score among returned hits when scoring is applicable.

items.title: SearchHit
items.description: One matched document together with optional scoring, field, and highlight metadata.

innerId.description: Underlying storage identifier of the matched document.

score.description: Per-hit relevance score when scoring is enabled.

fields.description: Additional field values returned alongside the document.

sort.description: Sort values corresponding to the configured sort clauses.

highlight.description: Highlighted fragments keyed by field name.
